title: lycopodium complanatum subsp. tristachyum
intro: Lycopodium complanatum subsp. tristachyum, also known as Tristachyos Lycopodium, is a type of club moss that belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Lycopodium complanatum subsp. tristachyum include relief from coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tinctures, capsules, or teas to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
